{# Furo has no host-agnostic version switcher of its own (its built-in one, rtd-versions.html, only activates under actual Read the Docs hosting). This reads switcher.json -- a flat list this repo's own docs/_root_templates/switcher.json renders once at the site root from sphinx-polyversion's build data -- so it works the same for every version, including tags built before this file existed. #}
    {% if mixle_commit and mixle_commit != "unknown" %}
    build {{ mixle_commit }}
    {% endif %}
